title: Ultra Luxury Perfume Advertisement Noirva Paris Lme
sourceTitle: Ultra Luxury Perfume Advertisement Noirva Paris Lme

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-luxury perfume advertisement for NOIRÉVA PARIS — L’ÂME NOIRE Eau De Parfum. A breathtaking young woman with the exact same face and identity as the reference image, no glasses, modern elegant updo hairstyle with soft loose strands, wearing a sophisticated black satin dress with tasteful coverage and no visible cleavage. Dark Paris night background with a small glowing Eiffel Tower, cinematic city bokeh, black roses, and luxury noir atmosphere. Premium black-and-gold perfume bottle on dark marble surface. Style inspired by Vogue, Dior, YSL Beauty campaigns. Deep black, gold, bronze, and warm amber color palette. Soft cinematic beauty lighting, glossy realistic skin, ultra-detailed 8K photorealism, Hasselblad medium format, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, luxury serif typography, premium editorial fragrance campaign aesthetic.
